title: ArticleCollected
description: Payload for navi.{env}.events.articles.collected. Published by digest/collector when a new article passes URL deduplication.

article_id.description: UUID v4 assigned to this article in the articles table before publishing.

feed_name.description: Human-readable feed name from feeds.yaml (e.g. 'Reuters Technology').

bucket.description: Content bucket the feed belongs to, from feeds.yaml.

url.description: Canonical article URL. Uniqueness is enforced against the articles table before publishing.

title.description: Article title as provided by the RSS feed.

raw_content.description: Extracted article text, trimmed to the content limit defined in ADR-0015. Empty string if extraction failed; enricher must handle this case.

collected_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of when the article was fetched by the collector.
